label: BookAuthorShape
description: A book must have exactly one author.

label: PersonAgeShape
description: The age of a person must be an integer.

label: PersonGenderShape
description: The gender of a person must be Male, Female, or Other.

label: PersonHeightShape
description: A person's height must be a positive decimal number.

label: BlogPostShape
description: A blog post must have at least one tag.

label: FilmRatingShape
description: A film's rating must be an integer between 1 and 5.

label: CityShape
description: The name of a city must not exceed 100 characters.

label: BookISBNShape
description: A book's ISBN must be a string.

label: CountryShape
description: A country code must be exactly two uppercase letters.

label: BookTitleShape
description: A book must have at least one title and at least one ISBN.
